summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AWS Enterprise Mapping feature. All 17 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend dashboard loads correctly with real AWS data showing 118 total resources, $113.85 monthly cost, 95% security score, and 98% compliance. Fixed ESLint error in AWSEnterpriseMappingComponents.jsx that was blocking frontend compilation.

integration_issues.issue: When switching tabs (S3, Lambda, RDS, etc.), the loading spinner shows briefly but the loading state is shared globally. Individual tab data fetches don't show loading indicators, resulting in 'No items found' message briefly appearing before data loads.

action_items: Consider adding per-tab loading states for better UX when switching between resource tabs
critical_code_review_comments: All AWS Enterprise Mapping endpoints properly return real AWS data via boto3
Cost breakdown correctly pulls from AWS Cost Explorer API
Resource discovery covers EC2, S3, RDS, Lambda, CloudFront, and IAM roles
Infrastructure map aggregates all resources with health metrics
Fixed ESLint error: removed invalid eslint-disable comment for react-hooks/exhaustive-deps rule
updated_files: /app/frontend/src/AWSEnterpriseMappingComponents.jsx - Fixed ESLint error by adding proper dependencies to useEffect

success_rate.frontend: 95% (all features working, minor UX improvement suggested)

seed_data_creation: No seed data needed - all data comes from real AWS account
context_for_next_testing_agent: AWS Enterprise Mapping is fully functional. Access via /aws-enterprise route after login. Features tested: health check, EC2 instances, S3 buckets, RDS instances, Lambda functions, CloudFront distributions, IAM roles, infrastructure map, cost breakdown, enterprise metrics, service types reference, regions reference. Real AWS data: 14 S3 buckets, 9 Lambda functions, 1 RDS instance, 7 CloudFront distributions, 87 IAM roles, $113.85 monthly cost.

health_check.test_health_endpoint: PASS - Returns healthy status with account_id 314108682794

resource_discovery.test_list_ec2_instances: PASS - Returns empty array (no EC2 instances)

infrastructure_map.test_get_infrastructure_map: PASS - Returns complete infrastructure map with resource counts

cost_management.test_get_cost_breakdown: PASS - Returns $113.85 total cost with breakdown by service and region

enterprise_metrics.test_get_enterprise_metrics: PASS - Returns 118 total resources, 95% security score, 98% compliance

reference_data.test_get_service_types: PASS - Returns 10 service types (compute, storage, database, etc.)
reference_data.test_get_regions: PASS - Returns 11 AWS regions with us-east-1 as default

frontend_ui_tests.aws_enterprise_dashboard: PASS - Loads with header, health status badge, tabs, and metrics cards
frontend_ui_tests.overview_tab: PASS - Shows Total Resources (118), Monthly Cost ($113.85), Security Score (95%), Compliance (98%)
frontend_ui_tests.resources_by_service_type: PASS - Shows EC2 (0), S3 (14), RDS (1), Lambda (9), CloudFront (7), IAM (87)

bug_fix_applied.issue: ESLint error: Definition for rule 'react-hooks/exhaustive-deps' was not found
bug_fix_applied.fix: Removed invalid eslint-disable comment and added proper dependencies to useEffect: [activeTab, fetchEc2Instances, fetchS3Buckets, fetchRdsInstances, fetchLambdaFunctions]
